tagline: Where the Spirit Moves, Lives Are Transformed.
subTagline: Join us as we walk in faith, love, and the power of the Holy Spirit.
missionStatement: To make disciples of Yeshua HaMashiach by building authentic Spirit-filled community, equipping believers through the Five Fold ministry, and reaching our city and nation with the love and power of God.
visionStatement: To see a generation arise in Jamshedpur and beyond — fully surrendered, Holy Spirit-empowered, and walking in the fullness of every gift and calling — transforming families, communities, and nations for His Kingdom.

title: Apostolic Leadership
description: Foundation-builders who establish churches and align the body with God's heavenly blueprint and apostolic order. The apostle carries a grace to pioneer, to set in order, and to build according to the pattern shown in Scripture.

title: Prophecy
description: Hearing from God for the church and individuals — speaking His heart to edify, exhort, and comfort His people. The prophet carries a sensitivity to the Spirit and a boldness to declare what God is saying in this hour.

title: Evangelism
description: Reaching out to people with the Good News of Yeshua — with passion, compassion, and Spirit-empowered proclamation. The evangelist carries a burning desire to see souls saved and lives transformed by the Gospel.

title: Pastoral Care
description: Learning to care for people — shepherding, nurturing, and protecting the flock with the heart of the Good Shepherd. The pastor carries a grace to walk with people through every season of life with love and wisdom.

title: Teaching
description: Unpacking the Word of God with clarity and depth — equipping every believer to walk in truth and spiritual maturity. The teacher carries a grace to make Scripture come alive and to ground the body in sound doctrine.

title: Weekly Bible Study
description: Join us every week as we dig deep into the living Word of God together. Our sessions are interactive, Spirit-led, and open to everyone — new believers and seasoned disciples alike. Come ready with your Bible, a heart of worship, and an expectation to hear from God.
schedule: Every Tuesday at 7:30 PM IST — hosted live on Zoom
scripture: "All Scripture is God-breathed and is useful for teaching, rebuking, correcting and training in righteousness, so that the servant of God may be thoroughly equipped for every good work." — 2 Timothy 3:16–17

name: Skit
description: Creative drama ministry to communicate the Gospel through storytelling and performance. We use creative arts to bring Scripture to life and reach hearts in powerful ways.
schedule: Every Saturday 6:00 PM IST on Zoom

name: Promotion
description: Spreading the message of Yeshua's Love Family through creative outreach, social media, and communication strategies. We tell the story of what God is doing in our community.
schedule: Every Wednesday 7:00 PM IST on Zoom

name: Open Home
description: Intimate gatherings where connections thrive and relationships flourish. Come and be part of our Open-Homes — real conversations, real faith, real family. These Zoom gatherings are the heartbeat of our community.
schedule: Every Friday 8:00 PM IST on Zoom

name: Broadcasting
description: Digital ministry team that streams, records, and distributes sermons and worship sessions. We carry the responsibility of taking the Word of God beyond our walls to the world.

name: Content Creation
description: Crafting compelling media — graphics, videos, social posts, and written content for Kingdom impact. We use creativity as a form of worship and outreach.
schedule: Every Thursday 7:30 PM IST on Zoom

name: Music Composition
description: Writing original worship music, hymns, and songs to usher in the presence of God. We believe that fresh songs carry a fresh anointing for every season the church is in.
schedule: Every Monday 7:00 PM IST on Zoom

name: Retreat Planning
description: Organising Spirit-filled retreats for deep encounters, rest, and renewal in God's presence. We create sacred spaces where the body of Christ can step away and draw near to God.

name: Video Editing
description: Post-production ministry team crafting powerful video testimonies, sermon highlights, and ministry content. We tell God's stories through the art of video.
schedule: Every Wednesday 8:00 PM IST on Zoom

name: Intercession
description: The prayer engine of Yeshua's Love Family — standing in the gap for the church, the city of Jamshedpur, and the nations. We believe prayer moves mountains and changes history.
schedule: Every Tuesday and Friday 6:00 AM IST on Zoom

name: Teaching
description: Preparing and delivering edifying lessons grounded in the Word of God for all age groups. We equip every member of the body to grow in the knowledge and grace of our Lord Yeshua.
schedule: Every Sunday 5:00 PM IST on Zoom

name: Worship
description: Leading the community in Spirit-filled, heartfelt praise and worship to Yeshua. We pursue the presence of God through music, song, and surrender — creating an atmosphere where He is glorified.
schedule: Every Sunday 4:00 PM IST on Zoom

title: Sunday Worship Service — YLF Jamshedpur
description: Join us for a powerful time of Spirit-filled worship and the Word. Experience the presence of God as we gather in His name.

title: Five Fold Ministry Teaching
description: Understanding your calling and gift in the body of Christ. An in-depth teaching on Ephesians 4:11 and how every believer fits into God's design.

title: Annual Retreat Highlights 2024
description: Precious moments from our Spirit-filled annual retreat — a time of deep encounters, renewal, and the tangible presence of God.

title: Night of Encounter — Worship & Prophecy
description: An evening of deep worship, prophetic ministry, and encountering the presence of Yeshua together as a family. Come expecting God to move in power.

title: Deep Dive — Book of Acts
description: Join our weekly online Bible Study as we journey through the Acts of the Apostles — signs, wonders, and the story of the early church. Every session is Spirit-led and interactive.

title: YLF Annual Retreat 2025
description: Three days of rest, renewal, worship, and deep encounters with God for the whole YLF family. A sacred time to step away, draw near, and be refreshed in His presence.
location: Jamshedpur — venue shared with registered members

title: Open Home — Community Evening
description: One of our beloved Open-Home gatherings — intimate, warm, and family-like. Come for real conversations, heartfelt prayer, and the joy of genuine community.

title: Walking in the Spirit: A Daily Guide to Holy Spirit-Led Living
excerpt: Discover practical principles for cultivating sensitivity to the Holy Spirit in your everyday walk with God. Learn how to hear His voice, follow His leading, and live a life marked by His fruit and power.

children.text: The Christian life was never meant to be lived in our own strength. From the very beginning, God's plan was for His Spirit to dwell within us — guiding, empowering, and transforming us from the inside out.
What Does It Mean to Walk in the Spirit?

To walk in the Spirit means to live in conscious dependence on the Holy Spirit — moment by moment, decision by decision. It is the opposite of walking in the flesh, which means relying on our own understanding, emotions, and desires.
"So I say, walk by the Spirit, and you will not gratify the desires of the flesh." — Galatians 5:16
First, cultivate a lifestyle of prayer. Prayer is not just asking God for things — it is communion with the Spirit. As you spend time in His presence, you grow sensitive to His voice and leading.
Second, stay in the Word. The Holy Spirit always speaks in alignment with Scripture. When you know the Word, you can more easily recognise when the Spirit is speaking to your heart.
Third, obey quickly. The Spirit often speaks in gentle nudges. When you sense His leading — act on it. Obedience builds trust, and trust deepens sensitivity.

author: YLF Leadership

title: Understanding Your Calling in the Five Fold Ministry
excerpt: An exploration of Ephesians 4:11 and how every believer fits into God's design for His church. Discover the grace gifts of apostle, prophet, evangelist, pastor, and teacher — and find where you belong.

children.text: In Ephesians 4:11, the Apostle Paul reveals one of the most beautiful and functional designs God has put in place for His church — the Five Fold Ministry. These are not just titles or positions. They are grace gifts given to specific people, for the purpose of equipping the entire body of Christ.
"So Christ himself gave the apostles, the prophets, the evangelists, the pastors and teachers, to equip his people for works of service." — Ephesians 4:11–12
The Purpose of the Five Fold

The Five Fold Ministry gifts are not given for the benefit of the individual who carries them. They are given for the benefit of the whole church. Their purpose is to equip the saints — every believer — for works of service, until we all reach unity and maturity in the faith.
At Yeshua's Love Family, we believe all five of these gifts are active today. We are committed to recognising, honouring, and flowing with each of these graces as God raises them up in our community.

author: YLF Leadership

title: The Power of Open Homes: Building Kingdom Community
excerpt: Why small, intimate gatherings might just be the most powerful form of church — and how Open Homes are changing lives in Yeshua's Love Family.

children.text: There is something that happens in a small gathering that rarely happens in a large crowd. Something raw, real, and deeply human. When people sit together — whether in a living room or on a Zoom call — with no agenda except to be present with one another and with God, something supernatural takes place.

An Open Home is simply a gathering where the door is open — to people, to conversation, to the Holy Spirit. At YLF, our Open Homes happen on Zoom every week and are some of the most cherished moments in our community calendar.
"They broke bread in their homes and ate together with glad and sincere hearts, praising God and enjoying the favor of all the people." — Acts 2:46–47
The early church was built on this model. Before buildings, before programmes, before budgets — there were homes. And in those homes, the Kingdom grew. We believe the same principle applies today.

author: YLF Leadership
